code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end
let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut out = ""
mut first = true
for p in parts
  let n = match string.parse_int(p) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
  let sq = n * n
  if first
    out = "#{sq}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{sq}"
  end
end
print(out)
